front.title: A Well-Known URI for API Change Advisories

abstract.t: This document defines a well-known URI, /.well-known/api- advisory.json, at which API providers MAY publish a machine-readable JSON file listing change advisories that affect their API. The file enables automated scanners and API consumers to discover pricing changes, deprecations, security advisories, and other relevant events without relying on manual monitoring of blogs or mailing lists.
